caller_name.description: Caller's full name as they gave it.

policy_number.description: Northwind policy number; read back digit-by-digit before moving on.

policy_active.description: Whether the policy is active and matches the caller. Bound from cap_verify_policy.

deductible_amount.description: Policy deductible in USD. Bound from cap_verify_policy. NOT to be quoted by the agent — adjuster discusses it on the callback.

named_drivers.description: Comma-separated names on the policy. Bound from cap_verify_policy.

coverage_summary.description: One-line summary of the policy's coverages, retrieved each turn while answering a coverage question. Bound from cap_lookup_coverage via retrieve_on_turn.

policy_retry_attempted.description: Whether the caller has already retried policy verification once. Prevents infinite re-prompts.

injuries_present.description: Whether anyone at the scene is hurt.

on_scene_safe.description: Whether the caller is in a safe location right now (not in traffic, not in immediate danger).

wants_emergency_callback.description: After deferring for emergency, whether the caller wants a human callback in an hour.

incident_when.description: Free-form date/time the caller gives for when the incident occurred.

incident_location.description: Address, intersection, or landmark where the incident occurred.

incident_description.description: One or two sentences from the caller describing what happened.

fault_assessment.description: Caller's own assessment of fault — agent never asserts a value, only captures.

police_report_filed.description: Whether a police report was filed at the scene.

vehicle_drivable.description: Whether the caller's vehicle can be driven.

damage_areas.description: Free-form description of damage areas (e.g. 'front bumper and right headlight').

other_party_present.description: Whether another vehicle / party was involved.

other_party_name.description: Name of the other party, if available.

other_party_contact.description: Other party's phone or email, if available.

photos_promised.description: Whether the caller agreed to send photos.

claim_id.description: Claim identifier returned by cap_file_claim. Templated into SCHEDULE_ADJUSTER scripts.

estimated_callback_window.description: Human-readable callback window returned by cap_file_claim (e.g. '2 hours').

claim_status.description: Final disposition of the claim from the agent's perspective.

callback_number.description: Phone number the adjuster should call back. Read back digit-by-digit.

callback_window.description: Preferred callback window. '1_hour' reserved for emergency-deferral path.

leave_note.description: On cancel/no-file: whether to leave a note on the policy that the caller reached out.

now.description: Today's calendar date; session clock anchor for date references in incident details.
